'''Termo''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was the commanding officer of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]] [[Liquidator (Imperial II-class)|''Liquidator'']] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. His [[Starship/Legends|ship]] arrived in the [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] after the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] attack on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. He was later informed by the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] of the Death Star's destruction.

Admiral Termo was tasked with an assault on [[Delrakkin City]] on the planet of [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]], using a task force of captured [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to frame the Alliance as an enemy of the galaxy rather than its savior. This attack failed when a Rebel pilot demolished this task force in his [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]], forcing the stragglers to retreat. Upon his capture, Termo personally attempted to interrogate the pilot, only to see his command ship destroyed as the daring pilot fought his way through the ''Liquidator'' and rigged it to explode.

Admiral Termo and his communications officer survived the blast by fleeing in an escape pod, but were left stranded in space as it was damaged by the ''Liquidator''{{'s}} explosion.

==Biography==
The [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual Termo served as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. His command ship was the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Liquidator (Imperial II-class)|''Liquidator'']], which was stationed in the [[Delrakkin system/Legends|Delrakkin system]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Termo was awaiting a transmission from [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], which by last reports was heading into the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] to destroy the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Great Temple/Legends|base]] located on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. The admiral was under strict instructions to wait in the Delrakkin system until further instructions were issued by Tarkin.<ref name="aoy4" />

When there was no word from the Yavin system, Termo grew concerned, and consulted quietly with [[Communications officer/Legends|Communications Officer]] [[Tix]] aboard the ''Liquidator''{{'s}} bridge. Tix confirmed that there were no communications, and Termo, observing a storm on [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]] below, wondered whether any atmospheric disturbance could have interrupted the transmission. According to Tix, the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] range from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] would prevent there from being such an issue. Speculating that some unknown fate had befallen Tarkin, Termo had [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Skeezer]] report to the ''Liquidator''{{'s}} forward launch bay and prepare to investigate what had transpired at Yavin.<ref name="aoy4" />

Skeezer was to take his modified and downsized [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] to the Yavin system, determine what had happened to the Death Star, and deal with any issues accordingly before returning. Termo appraised the captain of the fact that they had completely lost contact with Tarkin, and he forbade Skeezer from making any hyperspace communications with the ''Liquidator'', lest the Alliance be monitoring transmissions.<ref name="aoy4" />

==Personality and traits==
Termo was typically a figure of surety, to such a degree that his indecisiveness in the wake of Tarkin's missing instructions caused shock among staff such as Officer Tix. The admiral disliked having his officers speak without having first been spoken to, but was able to mask his anger with a calm tone of speech.<ref name="aoy4" />

Termo maintained a calm tone in times of crisis.<ref name="aoy4" />
